LEADSNAPPER 3.0
STEP 01
Unzip the Package
Extract the downloaded zip archive (LeadSnapper_Secure.zip). You will see a folder named LeadSnapper and this instruction guide. Keep the LeadSnapper folder in a safe directory where you won't accidentally delete or move it.
STEP 02
Open Extension Manager
Open Chrome or Edge browser, and enter the following path in the URL address bar to open the Extensions page:
STEP 03
Enable Developer Mode
Locate the Developer Mode switch in the top-right corner of the extensions page and turn it ON.
🛡️ Security Verification: LeadSnapper is loaded directly via the browser's developer tools. All your API keys and webhook settings are stored 100% locally on your machine. No scripts run externally.
STEP 04
Load Unpacked Extension
1. Click the Load unpacked button in the top-left corner.
2. Choose and select the LeadSnapper folder that you extracted in Step 1.
3. Once loaded, click the Puzzle icon in the browser toolbar, find LeadSnapper, and click the Pin icon to pin it for easy access.
✅ SYSTEM SECURED & ACTIVE
Need help? Contact our tech support at hy@hydigital.studio
